programmes.show_description: Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
Former Kiss FM DJ Robin Banks presents the 20 biggest party tunes of 1990 - a year of Betty Boo, MC Hammer, Deee-Lite and a bit of Turtle Power!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from Britpop, Boybands & R&B to the birth of electronic dance beats!
Radio 1 & Top of the Pops legend Gary Davies with the iconic images & award winning clips that set the style of 1992. Including Annie Lennox, Def Leppard, REM & Shakespear's Sister.
Mark Goodier with 1994's big music award winners. Which album shocked the 'Mercury Music Prize', and which new boyband collectively won 'Most Tragic Haircuts'?
2 hours of the biggest feel-good tunes - all from 1996. Including Mark Morrison, Iggy Pop, Robbie Williams & Faithless!

programmes.show_name: Mark Goodier: UK Top 40 of the 00s
programmes.show_description: Mark Goodier with the 40 biggest selling singles of the decade. Including 35 UK number 1s and big million-selling hits from Girls Aloud, Shakira and James Blunt.
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!
30 classic boyband tracks back to back - one from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
His band Blue represented the UK in 2011-coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners & losers over 50 years as we go Eurovision crazy with 2 hours of highs-and lows!
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!
Anthems & cheesy tunes from the bars, clubs & pool parties of Mediterranean holidays gone by! Expect Whigfield, Ace Of Base & many more that you enjoyed in the sun!
Time to draw the curtains, hold up the lighter and sing your heart out with the 40 greatest power ballads of the 90s!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
A little bit of love in the 90s from the likes of Take That, George Michael, Boyzone, Whitney Houston, Celine Dion and a load more.

programmes.show_name: Cuddle on the Couch - The Love 50
programmes.show_description: 4 hours of 90s love. What more could you ask for? We all need a cuddle on the couch every now and again.
Dim the lights, set the mood and get ready for the passion, heartbreak & timeless romance of the 2000s. Anthems for a generation that continue to resonate today.
Pat fires Cupid's arrow at 30 hits that made us madly in love! With uplifting dance bangers, cool RnB and perfect pop moments that are truly timeless.
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
Starting back in 2009 with Love Story, here are Taylor's greatest tracks!

programmes.show_name: Jenny Powell: Such A Good Feeling!
programmes.show_description: Dancing through history - one anthem at a time! From late 80s optimism to mid 90s euphoria, it's where house, rave & eurodance all started. Hands in the air people!
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
